headline: Progressive (PGR) CFO John Sauerland to Retire After 35-Year Tenure
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) is one of the best stocks for 20 years. Earlier on January 28, Progressive announced that John Sauerland, the company’s Chief Financial Officer, will retire on July 3 this year. Sauerland’s departure marks the conclusion of a 35-year career with the insurer, including a decade-long tenure as CFO. President and CEO […]
